---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a reproducible bug or unexpected behaviour
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Command

```bash
python advanced_pipeline.py <your_flags_here>
```

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include the full error message and traceback.

```
paste error here
```

## Environment

| Item | Value |
|---|---|
| OS | e.g. Ubuntu 22.04 / macOS 14 / Android 13 (Termux) |
| Python version | e.g. 3.11.2 |
| ffmpeg version | output of `ffmpeg -version` |
| Input format | e.g. AMR, MP3, WAV |
| Input duration | e.g. 5 minutes |

## Additional context

Any other context, screenshots, or log output that might help diagnose the issue.
